derived.causal_summary: Promotes sk-code react/ and go/ from placeholder to live branches. Frontend content modeled on kerkmeester.com (Next.js 14 App Router + vanilla-extract + motion v12 + Untitled UI + react-hook-form/zod + react-aria + Sonner + next-themes + optional TinaCMS). Backend paired: gin + sqlc + Postgres + go-playground/validator + golang-jwt JWT auth. Adds a cross-stack pairing reference doc that documents the React↔Go API contract (REST, JSON envelope, cursor pagination), JWT handoff (Go issues, React stores in httpOnly cookie or memory, Auth.js consumes), error envelope shape ({error: {code, message, details?}}), CORS configuration, and deploy topology (React on Vercel, Go on Railway/Fly.io/DigitalOcean). SKILL.md routing updates move REACT and GO from PLACEHOLDER_STACKS to LIVE_STACKS with full intent → file maps mirroring WEBFLOW shape; ~25 fullstack-specific keywords added to TASK_SIGNALS (vanilla-extract, motion v12, server action, server component, hydration, app router, untitled ui, gin, sqlc, pgx, golang-jwt, etc.). No new branch label or stack-detection edits — uses existing Next.js → REACT and go.mod → GO precedent. Three placeholders remain (nodejs/, react-native/, swift/); their canonical content was retired in packet 055 and they continue to surface a placeholder pointer.
